daily_take.headline: Hormuz Spike Signals Shallow Iran Capitulation Bet, Not Real Shipping Relief
daily_take.deck: The Strait of Hormuz "back to normal" contract jumped 25 points in 24 hours to 48.5%, riding broader Iran de-escalation sentiment. But the market is pricing a political win, not actual tanker traffic. Smart money should fade this. Shipping normalization requires sustained Iranian compliance, not a ceasefire announcement. Buy the NO side at 51.5% or wait for a 55%+ pump.
